case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. DELIA DE LA PENA et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PENA, DELIA DE LA
